boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Energy / utilities / infrastructure controls action now? Action: field work dispatch with expired permit. Boundary: scheduler message cannot dispatch without permit closure.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes boundary; execute may proceed.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect; warning tone is nonbinding.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current source-control record.

final_answer: ALLOW. The current control record explicitly closes the exact action boundary: permit, crew certification, and work order match are current and tied to this dispatch. Communication warnings do not override source-control records, so the scheduler may proceed under the closed boundary.
